content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


June 18, 2004


Robert C. Cheasty
Cheasty & Cheasty
Post Office Box 8357
Berkeley, CA 94707

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-133

Dear Mr. Cheasty:

This letter confirms the receipt of your June 8, 2004, request for advice regarding an unpaid president of a nonprofit organization. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of the person for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis.

Formal written advice may be requested when the name, title or position and mailing address of the person whose duties are in question are provided. (Regulation 18329(b)(2)(A).) I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions with regard to this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Enclosures
